name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan represents a significant shift in the analytical methodology compared to the old plan. While both plans involve analyzing point-vortex and L\u00e9vy walk datasets, the new plan introduces entirely new analytical frameworks (e.g., residence time analysis, VACF/Mutual Information, sliding-window non-stationarity, and KL divergence-based null model comparison) that were not present in the original plan. The original plan focused on characteristic function fitting and TAMSD power-law slopes, whereas the new plan prioritizes noise sensitivity analysis, mechanistic residence time distributions, and phase-space mapping. Consequently, the computational steps are fundamentally different, and no steps from the old plan can be reused.
